description: Search Facebook Marketplace via browser automation
usage_instructions: Use for searching and browsing Facebook Marketplace listings via browser automation. Commands follow `facebook_marketplace <group> <action>` pattern. This is a dedicated Marketplace-only tool — for Messenger or other Facebook features, use the `facebook` CLI instead.

auth.usage_instructions: Authentication via browser automation. Login opens a headed browser window for manual Facebook login. Session persists across commands.

login.help: Login to Facebook Marketplace via browser. Opens a headed browser window for you to log in. Idempotent - skips if already logged in (use --force to re-authenticate).
login.usage_instructions: Login via headed browser window. Idempotent — skips if already logged in. Use --force/-F to close existing session and re-authenticate.

status.help: Check authentication status. Returns exit code 0 if authenticated, 2 if not.
status.usage_instructions: Check if authentication is active. Exit code 0 = authenticated, 2 = not authenticated.

test.help: Test if authentication works against a real browser session.
test.usage_instructions: Verify authentication works by testing against a real browser session. Use --verbose/-v for detailed checks.

logout.help: Close browser session and clear authentication.
logout.usage_instructions: Close the browser session and clear stored auth. Use --force/-F to skip confirmation.

listings.help: Search and browse Facebook Marketplace listings
listings.usage_instructions: Search and browse Marketplace listings. Use `listings list` to browse or search, and `listings get` for individual listing details. Supports location, price filtering, and image downloading.

list.help: List Facebook Marketplace listings. Without --query, browses "Today's picks" for the location. With --query, searches by keyword.
list.usage_instructions: List Marketplace listings. Without --query/-q, shows Today's picks. With --query/-q, searches by keyword. Default location is 'evansville'; change with --location/-L. Use --min-price/--max-price for price filtering. Use --include-detail for full descriptions. Use --download-images to save listing images locally. Default limit is 50.

options.name: --include-detail
options.help: Navigate to each listing for description and full details

options.name: --download-images
options.help: Download listing images to local cache (implies --include-detail)

get.help: Get details for a specific Facebook Marketplace listing.
get.usage_instructions: Get full details for a specific listing. ITEM_ID is a required positional argument. Use --download-images to save images locally. Use --properties/-p to select specific fields.

options.name: --download-images
options.help: Download listing images to local cache
